nasb.text: When the Lord saw that he turned aside to look, God called to him from the midst of the bush and said, “Moses, Moses!” And he said, “Here I am.”

esv.text: When the Lord saw that he turned aside to see, God called to him out of the bush, “Moses, Moses!” And he said, “Here I am.”

cnv.text: 耶和華見摩西要到那邊去觀看，　神就從荊棘叢裡呼叫他，說：“摩西，摩西。”摩西說：“我在這裡。”

ccb.text: 耶和华上帝见他要上前观看，就从荆棘丛中呼唤他说：“摩西！摩西！”摩西说：“我在这里。”
